name: Moroccan Barbecued Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 boneless chicken thighs with skin (1 lb), halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat broiler.
2. In a large bowl, combine olive oil, lemon zest, lemon juice, 1 tablespoon mint leaves, 1 teaspoon garlic, paprika, salt, and pepper until blended.
3. Add chicken and turn to coat well.
4. Arrange chicken on the broiler pan rack, 4-6 inches from the heat source.
5. Broil for 7 minutes per side, turning once, until well browned and cooked through.
6. Transfer chicken to a platter.
7. Sprinkle with remaining mint leaves and garlic.
8. Garnish with mint sprig and lemon slices.
